workstreams.objective: Reconcile HELIX30000 after PR #1 merged by recording the merge and skipped review gate, releasing the obsolete feature-branch role claim, and separating stable control-tower coordination from temporary branch ownership.
workstreams.authority_expiry_condition: This write claim expires automatically when the reconciliation pull request closes or merges; live GitHub state outranks this record.

capability_boundary.repository_writes: declared permitted paths in anthonyedgar30000/HELIX30000 only

verification_criteria: the registry validates with the standard-library validator
the control-tower role cannot claim persistent branch ownership or repository-write authority
only write_owner roles can own a repository branch
PR #1 is recorded as merged and CI-verified but not independently reviewed
external PR heads are refreshed from live GitHub metadata
the pull-request diff remains inside permitted_paths
CI uses no secrets, cloud credentials, external APIs, or mutation capabilities
workstreams.next_gate: Open a draft pull request, obtain exact-head CI, and request independent coordination review. Do not merge from this conversation.
